testcase.name: test_analyze_text_stages_include_required

failure.message: AssertionError: Stage gpt_analysis not ok assert False == True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbc4788b2c40>('ok') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbc4788b2c40> = {'error': 'STAGE:gpt_call | GPT request failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.41452395, Max budget: 1.4', 'ok': False, 'stage': 'gpt_analysis'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pipeline_debug.py:85: in test_analyze_text_stages_include_required assert stage_dict[stage_name].get("ok") == True, f"Stage {stage_name} not ok" E AssertionError: Stage gpt_analysis not ok E assert False == True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbc4788b2c40>('ok') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbc4788b2c40> = {'error': 'STAGE:gpt_call | GPT request failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.41452395, Max budget: 1.4', 'ok': False, 'stage': 'gpt_analysis'}.get

testcase.name: test_analyze_image_jpeg_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert True == False + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbc478c5e580>('fallback') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbc478c5e580> = {'fallback': True, 'reason': 'STAGE:gpt_call | GPT request failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.41452395, Max budget: 1.4', 'stages': [{'bytes': 10467, 'content_type': 'image/jpeg', 'name': 'test_sides.jpg', 'ok': True, ...}, {'detected': 'image', 'ok': True, 'stage': 'type_detection'}, {'jpeg_kb': 5.9, 'ok': True, 'stage': 'image_convert'}, {'error': 'STAGE:gpt_call | GPT request failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.41452395, Max budget: 1.4', 'ok': False, 'stage': 'gpt_vision'}]}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pipeline_debug.py:116: in test_analyze_image_jpeg_success assert debug.get("fallback") == False E AssertionError: assert True == False E + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbc478c5e580>('fallback') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbc478c5e580> = {'fallback': True, 'reason': 'STAGE:gpt_call | GPT request failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded!
